Programs

Business Management

MENU

The aim of our program is; To train qualified personnel who will meet the needs of businesses and the sector, respond to market demands, carry out production and service activities efficiently, recognize problems and opportunities related to business in the business they work for, and provide services in accordance with international professional standards. For this purpose, our strong teaching staff, who have high private sector experience as well as academic knowledge; It tries to prepare our students for business life with case studies adapted from business life, theoretical topics, successful entrepreneurship stories and legislation reviews.

Human resources management, communication, information management, entrepreneurship, sales, marketing, etc. Our graduates, who get to know the sector through internship practices as well as different courses in the field of business administration and have the opportunity to closely follow new developments in global markets through sector collaborations and events, can be employed as intermediate staff in many different departments.

Our graduates, who have gained the ability to explain the concepts and their importance related to business disciplines, will be able to advance to higher level management positions over time, depending on their success and self-improvement, by completing their technological infrastructure.
